g.text: (child-facing app "/"; rose = planned, not yet built)
ADR-014 -- mints a 90-day device grant, then
drops back here; a returning authorized device
RequestStory on the library page • shipped
surfaces to a guardian/admin to approve or decline
(no moderation detail ever shown to the child)
My progress saves as I go
(restart + back to library, no rating here)
(rating lives in the library, not the reader)
Rate a book by tapping its stars
Shipped in the kid app today
The kid surface is a separate route tree from the guardian console and shares
no navigation. ADR-014: the whole tree sits behind a local device-grant check
(DeviceAuthorizedRoute), not a per-page gate, and stays Supabase-free.
See journey-guardian for the parent side, seq-device-grant for the mint/verify/
revoke mechanics, journey-end-to-end for the whole loop, and journey-dev-coverage
